auth.inviteBannerBody: Create your free account below to get started with DirectBnB.

onboarding.title: Welcome to DirectBnB! 🎉
onboarding.subtitle: Follow these steps to get your first B&B online.

properties.title: Properties
properties.subtitle: Manage your B&Bs and guesthouses
properties.newSubtitle: Fill in the basic details to get started
properties.name: Name
properties.emptySubtitle: Create a free booking page for your B&B

guests.subtitle: Overview of all your guests
guests.name: Name
guests.empty: No guests yet. Guests are created automatically when bookings are made.
guests.noResults: No guests found for this search.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account details
settings.betaFeedbackDescription: Help us improve DirectBnB by sharing your feedback.

booking.notFoundDescription: This page doesn't exist or is no longer available.
booking.selectRoomFirst: Select a room above to make a reservation
booking.messagePlaceholder: Tell the host something about your stay...
booking.noPaymentRequired: No payment required — the host will contact you.
booking.bookingError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
booking.successDescription: The host will contact you as soon as possible.

hero.subheadline: Manage reservations, availability and guest communication from one simple platform — without relying on large booking platforms.

value.title: Everything in your own hands
value.subtitle: Manage your B&B the way you want, without relying on big booking platforms.
value.card1Desc: Share your own booking page and receive requests directly from guests.
value.card2Desc: No fees to Booking.com or Airbnb. Every euro stays with you.
value.card3Desc: Block dates, view availability and manage multiple rooms effortlessly.
value.card4Desc: Get online in minutes with your own booking page.

how.label: How it works
how.title: Online in three steps
how.subtitle: Setting up your B&B and receiving direct bookings literally takes minutes.
how.step1Desc: Fill in your B&B details, add rooms with photos, descriptions and pricing.
how.step2Desc: You receive a personal link to share via your website, social media or email.
how.step3Desc: Confirm requests, send payment links and stay in touch with guests — all in one place.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything you need to run your B&B
features.subtitle: From booking management to online payments — DirectBnB has you covered.
features.f1Desc: Confirm or reject requests with one click. Full overview of all reservations.
features.f2Desc: Guest details are saved automatically with complete booking history per guest.
features.f3Desc: Send payment links via iDEAL, bank transfer or credit card — powered by Mollie.
features.f4Desc: Receive real-time alerts for new bookings and payments.
features.f5Desc: Block dates, visualise occupancy and manage multiple rooms.
features.f6Desc: Guests automatically receive confirmation and payment emails.

beta.title: Join the DirectBnB Beta
beta.subtitle: We're starting in the Netherlands and expanding quickly. Sign up for free as a beta user and share feedback that shapes the product.
beta.geo: 🇳🇱 Now available in the Netherlands · International expansion coming soon
beta.noCredit: No credit card required · Always free during beta

languages.title: Available in multiple languages
languages.subtitle: DirectBnB currently supports Dutch and English. More languages are in development to better serve international guests.

finalCta.title: Start receiving direct bookings today
finalCta.subtitle: No more high commissions. Full control over your reservations. Simple and fast.

betaling.subtitle: Secured by Mollie Payments · DirectBnB
betaling.notFoundDesc: Check the link and try again.
betaling.notAvailableDesc: This payment link is no longer valid.
betaling.paidDesc: Thank you, {name}. Your payment for {property} has been received. You will receive a confirmation email.
betaling.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
